CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-21-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Continued To Jan-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Murphy.
Scott Dunning, Esq. for Petitioner: Yui Chung Lai, present as Guardian at litem for: Andrew Lai, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Settlement $13,217.00
Attorney's Fees $3,179.90
Medical Expenses $497.42
Costs $1,415.00
A net balance of $8,124.68 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 2300 Irving St., San Francisco, CA. 94122, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2005 Off Calendar
